block_00: Card chhaviyaan ko asvikrit kar diya gaya
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi debit/credit card partiyon ko asvikaar kar diya gaya tha kyonki ve dhundhali thi. Kripya neeche diye gaye link ke maadhyam se naye card chhaviyaan upload karen.
block_03: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki saraahana karte hain.
block_06: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
